home.hero: Find a qualified professional in minutes
home.subtitle: Post your need — plumbing, electrical, masonry, mechanics — and get contacted by verified professionals near you.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: A simple and fast process to connect you with the right professional.
home.step1Desc: Category, description, photos, location — in under 2 minutes.
home.step2Desc: Nearby qualified professionals are alerted instantly.
home.step3Desc: Review profiles, ratings, and pick the best fit.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of clients and professionals using Mission Pro every day.

homeLoggedIn.heroSubtitle: Post your needs, track your requests, and connect with verified professionals — all in one place.
homeLoggedIn.interactionsSubtitle: From posting your need to getting the job done, here's how every interaction unfolds on Mission Pro.
homeLoggedIn.interaction1Desc: The client posts a request with category, description, photos, and location.
homeLoggedIn.interaction2Desc: Nearby verified professionals receive an instant notification.
homeLoggedIn.interaction3Desc: Interested professionals contact the client directly through the platform.
homeLoggedIn.interaction4Desc: The client picks their professional, the work is done, then reviewed.
homeLoggedIn.clientStep1Desc: Describe your problem in detail: trade category, description, photos of the issue, and your address. Qualified professionals will be alerted automatically.
homeLoggedIn.clientStep2Desc: Verified professionals in your area will reach out. Check their profiles, reviews, and experience before making your choice.
homeLoggedIn.clientStep3Desc: Once the job is complete, leave a review to help the community and future clients choose the right professional.
homeLoggedIn.proStep1Desc: Get notified whenever a client in your area and field of expertise posts a need matching your skills.
homeLoggedIn.proStep2Desc: Review the request details — description, photos, urgency — and send a message to the client offering your services.
homeLoggedIn.proStep3Desc: Complete the work, earn great reviews, and build your reputation on the platform to attract more clients.

auth.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.registrationSuccess: Account created! You can now log in.

pro.noRequests: No requests in your area at the moment.
pro.pendingVerification: Your profile is pending admin verification.
pro.rejected: Your profile was rejected. Contact support.
pro.contactSuccess: The client has been notified of your interest.

jobs.createSubtitle: Describe your problem to get matched with the right professionals.
jobs.photosHint: Add photos to help professionals better understand.
jobs.errorAddress: Please enter a valid address and locate it on the map.
